notes.connections:
Keithley 0 (Power Supply)
    CH1 "3P3V"   → 3.3 V, 20 mA limit, output ON
    CH2 "N2P5V"  → 2.5 V, 20 mA limit, output ON (route through external inverter to VNEG pin)
    CH3 "CH3"   → 0.0 V, unused
Hittite 0 RF1 (Signal Generator) → DUT RF1
FieldFox 0 RF2 (Spectrum Analyzer) ← DUT RF2
notes.sources:
Keithley 0 – VPOS = 3.3 V, VNEG = -2.5 V (via inverter), 20 mA limits per datasheet
Hittite 0 RF1 – CW tone, 5 GHz, -10 dBm (Filter Band 4 passband: 3.74–10.08 GHz)
FieldFox 0 RF2 – Spectrum, center 5 GHz, span 5 GHz; baseline peak: 4.975 GHz @ -32.6 dBm
notes.monitoring:
Keithley 0 – Log VPOS / VNEG supply currents (expected ~12-14 mA / ~2-3 mA)
FieldFox 0 RF2 – Record tone amplitude at 5 GHz (passband insertion loss)
Register reads: 0x00 (status), 0x03 (switch pos), 0x10-0x13 (filter band states), 0xFE (scratchpad integrity)
notes.general:
Config: ADMV8809 – SINGLE BAND TEST (Filter Band 4, 3.74–10.08 GHz)
Programming logic: ADMV8809.py

SPI programming sequence:
	1. 0x00 = 0x81  (soft reset)
	2. 0x00 = 0x3C  (enable SDO, ascending Endian)
	3. 0xFE = 0xA5  (scratchpad write, verify SPI)
	4. Set unused bands 2,3,4 to isolation: HPF=7, LPF=0
	5. Set Filter Band 1 HPF/LPF state for desired corner
	6. 0x03 = Filter_Band_1  (switch position)

Stimulus / capture:
	HT0 RF1: 5 GHz, -10 dBm CW
	FF0 RF2: center 5 GHz, span 2 GHz – read peak amplitude

SEE monitoring loop:
	- Poll register_read_array; flag any deviation from programmed values
	- Re-read 0xFE scratchpad each cycle to confirm SPI link
	- Log VPOS / VNEG currents; spike or droop = latch-up candidate
